project.name: Orenivo
project.productSummary: A Chrome extension for desktop ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini and DeepSeek that adds folders, search and saved prompts.
project.qualifier: desktop web + Chrome/Edge only for now
project.shareLine: If you're on desktop Chrome/Edge, happy to share it.

subreddits.name: ClaudeAI
subreddits.focus: Claude power users with sidebar and retrieval pain

subreddits.name: ChatGPT
subreddits.focus: High-volume ChatGPT users who need folders and search

subreddits.name: OpenAI
subreddits.focus: Users comparing or actively using ChatGPT + Claude

queries.label: ChatGPT folder pain
queries.query: "ChatGPT" ("too many chats" OR "can't find" OR "lost a chat" OR "need folders")

queries.label: Claude organization pain
queries.query: "Claude" ("need folders" OR "can't find old chat" OR "organize chats" OR "too many conversations")

queries.label: Multi-model switching
queries.query: ("ChatGPT" AND "Claude") ("use both" OR "switch between" OR "both daily")

queries.label: Prompt library pain
queries.query: ("save prompts" OR "prompt library" OR "reusable prompts") ("ChatGPT" OR "Claude")

queries.label: AI workflow fragmentation
queries.query: ("AI workflow" OR "AI stack") ("too many tools" OR fragmented OR messy OR chaos)
